variants: Amna Siddiqui is a dedicated professional employed at Thistlewind Travel, where she actively uses her knowledge of Cree vocabulary to enhance guest experiences. Amna completed her education at Mistvale School of Engineering, laying a foundational understanding that supports both her career and civic activities. Her writings are published by Maple & Quill Books, where she shares insights that reflect her interests and experiences.
